S

samAccountName - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AuthenticatedUserInfo
 
ScanAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
The sets of attributes for requesting a scan.
An instance of this class is created using one of the builders.
ScanAttributes.AutomaticStraightenMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
To straighten content that is skewed relative to the page dimensions in the source document.
ScanAttributes.AutomaticToneMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Automatic tone mode.
ScanAttributes.BackgroundCleanup - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Background Cleanup controls the level of removing background on a scanned image.
ScanAttributes.BlankImageRemovalMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Blank Image Removal Mode controls the whether to skip blank pages or not.
ScanAttributes.CaptureMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Scan capture Mode.
ScanAttributes.ColorDropoutMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Color dropout mode for scanning
ScanAttributes.ColorMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
A collection of ColorMode.
ScanAttributes.ContrastAdjustment - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Contrast Adjustment controls the level of contrast correction on a scanned image.
ScanAttributes.CropMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Crop Mode controls whether the scanned image be cropped to the contents or not .
ScanAttributes.DarknessAdjustment - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Darkness Adjustment controls the level of darkness correction on a scanned image.
ScanAttributes.Destination - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
A collection of destinations for scanning.
ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
A collection of document formats for scanning.
ScanAttributes.Duplex - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
A collection of duplex mode
ScanAttributes.EmailBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the specified E-mail recipients.
ScanAttributes.EraseMarginUnit - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Margin unit used for erase edge.
ScanAttributes.FtpBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external FTP server.
ScanAttributes.HttpBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external HTTP(S) server.
ScanAttributes.JobAssemblyMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Job Assembly Mode controls whether to allow multiple scan segments assembled into a single job when completed.
ScanAttributes.MeBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images back to the client.
ScanAttributes.MediaSource - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Media Source controls whether device to scan from the ADF or flatbed.
ScanAttributes.MediaWeightAdjustment - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Enumeration of media weight adjustments.
ScanAttributes.MisfeedDetectionMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Misfeed Detection Mode controls whether to detect mis feed or not.
ScanAttributes.NetworkFolderBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external network folder server.
ScanAttributes.Orientation - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
A collection of original Orientation options.
ScanAttributes.OutputQuality - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Output Quality controls the result quality of a scanned image.
ScanAttributes.ProgressDialogMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Progress Dialog Mode controls whether to show device built-in progress dialog or not.
ScanAttributes.Resolution - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
A collection of resolution types for scanning.
ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T>> - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Base builder for common scan attributes
ScanAttributes.ScanPreview - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Scan Preview controls for showing a preview of scanned images and requesting confirmation before completing the scan.
ScanAttributes.ScanSize - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
The scan size (i.e., size of the original) for scanning.
ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T>> - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external HTTP(S) server.
ScanAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Sharpness Adjustment controls the level of sharpness correction on a scanned image.
ScanAttributes.SplitAttachmentByPage - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Enable this feature to scan pages into separate files based on a specified page limit.
ScanAttributes.TextPhotoOptimization - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Enumeration of text versus photo optimization settings
ScanAttributes.TransmissionMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Transmission Mode controls whether a image file will be sent after each page scanned or all files sent when job completed.
ScanAttributes.UsbBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to attached USB storage.
ScanAttributesCaps - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Scan attributes capabilities provided available values from the device.
ScanAttributesReader - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Reads attributes from requested scan job
ScanAttributesReader(ScanAttributes) - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributesReader
Constructor to create new instance of ScanAttributesReader
ScanInfo - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan
Provides Scan information
ScanInfo() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan.ScanInfo
 
ScanJobData - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Provides details of SCAN job.
ScanJobState - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Enumerations of the state for scan Job
ScanJobState.ActivityState - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Returns the state of scan activity.
ScanJobState.State - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Returns the state of scan job
ScanletAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Attributes to determine behavior after submitting scan job.
ScanletAttributes.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Builder for creating an instance of ScanletAttributes.
ScannedSheetInfo - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan
Provides Scanned sheet information
ScannedSheetInfo() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan.ScannedSheetInfo
 
ScannedSheetInfo.ScannedSheetSets - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan
 
ScannedSheetSets() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan.ScannedSheetInfo.ScannedSheetSets
 
ScannerInfo - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.scanner
Provides methods to retrieve scan job information
ScannerInfo.ByJobCategory - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.scanner
Job information by category
ScannerInfo.ByMediaSize - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.scanner
Retrieves Job information by mediaSize
ScannerService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
ScannerService provides an easy to use interface to initiate built-in tasks related to the scanner.
ScannerStatus - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
ScannerStatus provides an interface to retrieve scanner status details for scanning
SDK_ACCESS_DEVICE_EVENTS_PERMISSION - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.permissions
Permission to access DeviceEventsService
SDK_ACCESS_DEVICE_USAGE_PERMISSION - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.permissions
Permission to access DeviceUsageService
SDK_ACCESS_STATISTICS_PERMISSION - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.permissions
Permission to access StatisticsService
SDK_ACCESS_SUPPLIES_PERMISSION - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.permissions
Permission to access SuppliesService
send(Context, EmailAttributes, Result) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.Email
Request to send an email specified by EmailAttributes based on a printer's SMTP settings.
send(Context, EmailAttributes, SmtpAttributes, Result) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.Email
Sends an email specified by EmailAttributes using device's SMTP settings or client's SMTP information.
send(Context, EmailAttributes, SmtpAttributes, ProxyAttributes, Result) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.Email
Sends an email specified by EmailAttributes using SMTP settings defined by SmtpAttributes
setAddNewPermissionToGuestPermissionSet(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.ProxyConfiguration.Builder
Sets whether to add new permissions to the guest permission set.
setAllowMultipleScan(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes.Builder
Sets whether to allow multiple scan (default is false).

Method to set attribute

Sets the authorized user overrides.

setAutoLaunchAppAccessPointId(String) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.access.UserPreferencesAttributes.Builder
Sets the UUID of an application access point which may be used by the device to automatically launch the application access point immediately after signing in.

Sets whether or not print job should be running on the background.

Sets color mode for print
setColorMode(ScanAttributes.ColorMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder

setConfiguration(Context, Result, ProxyConfiguration) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AuthorizationService
Sets the proxy configuration for the authorization service.
setConnectTimeout(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.SmtpAttributes.Builder
Sets the socket connect timeout to wait until connection is closed.
setConnectTimeout(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder
Sets the socket connect timeout - how much time to wait before socket will be opened when sending scanned file
Default value is 60 seconds.
Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
setConnectTimeout(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.SmtpAttributes.Builder
Sets the socket connect timeout - how much time to wait before socket will be opened
Default value is 60 seconds.
Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.

Sets the contrast adjustment level.
setContrastAdjustment(ScanAttributes.ContrastAdjustment) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder
Sets the contrast adjustment level.

setPdfEncryptionPassword(String) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.FileOptionsAttributes.Builder
Sets the value of the pdfEncryptionPassword property.
setPermissionToSignInMethodMap(List<PermissionToSignInMethod>) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.ProxyConfiguration.Builder
Sets the permission to sign-in method map.
setPort(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.ProxyAttributes.Builder
Sets Proxy port for email.
setPort(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.SmtpAttributes.Builder
Sets SMTP port for establishing a connection to SMTP server
setPort(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.SmtpAttributes.Builder
Sets SMTP port for establishing a connection to SMTP server
Default value is 25.
Range: 1 ~ 65535.
setPrintCustomLength(float) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder
Sets the print custom length.
setPrintCustomWidth(float) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder
Sets the print custom width.
setPrintDuplex(CopyAttributes.Duplex) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder
Set Print Duplex for printing
setPrintQuality(PrintAttributes.PrintQuality) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.printer.PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder
Sets Print quality for print
setPrintSize(CopyAttributes.PaperSize) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder
Specifies the size of the printed image.
setProgressDialogMode(CopyAttributes.ProgressDialogMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder
Set progress dialog mode
setProgressDialogMode(ScanAttributes.ProgressDialogMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder
Sets the progress dialog mode.
setProxyConfigurationMode(ProxyAttributes.ProxyConfigurationMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.ProxyAttributes.Builder
Sets the configuration mode for proxy.
setPunchMode(CopyAttributes.PunchMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder
Sets punch mode
setReadTimeout(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.SmtpAttributes.Builder
Sets the socket read timeout to wait for starting reading a data.
setReadTimeout(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder
Sets the socket read timeout - how much time to wait before data becomes available to read from socket when sending scanned file Default value is 60 seconds.
Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
setReadTimeout(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.SmtpAttributes.Builder
Sets the socket read timeout - how much time to wait before data becomes available to read from socket Default value is 60 seconds.
Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
setResolution(ScanAttributes.Resolution) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder
Indicates the resolution for the scanned image(s).
setRetentionModeOnPowerCycle(CopyAttributes.RetentionMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.StoreCopyBuilder
Sets on power cycle retention mode for stored job supported by the printer.
setRetentionModeOnRelease(CopyAttributes.RetentionMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.StoreCopyBuilder
Sets on release retention mode for stored jobs.
setRetryInterval(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder
Sets the minimum number of seconds to wait before attempting a retry.
Default value is 60 seconds.
Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
setRightMargin(float) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.Margins
set right margin
setSAMAccountName(String) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.access.AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder

setShowCredentialsUi(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyletAttributes.Builder
Sets whether a credentials UI should appear in case of authentication error (default is true).
setShowCredentialsUi(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes.Builder
Sets whether a credentials UI should appear in case of authentication error (default is true).
setShowSettingsUi(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyletAttributes.Builder
Sets whether a copier settings UI should appear prior to sending to the printer.
setShowSettingsUi(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.printer.PrintletAttributes.Builder
Sets whether or not a printer settings UI should appear prior to sending to the device.
setShowSettingsUi(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes.Builder
Sets whether a scanner settings UI should appear prior to sending to the printer.
setShowUi(boolean) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobletAttributes.Builder
Sets option to use a job progress built-in UI that's provided by SDK Service when the job is being executed.

Sets the text format (SDDL) of the user's Microsoft Security Descriptor.

Sets security mode for establishing a connection to SMTP server.
setTransportMode(SmtpAttributes.TransportMode) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.SmtpAttributes.Builder
Sets security mode for establishing a connection to SMTP server.
If security mode is changed to SmtpAttributes.TransportMode.SSL_TLS port must be also switched to SSL port using SmtpAttributes.Builder.setPort(int).

SIGN_IN - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.actions
Action sent as a broadcast intent by the Workpath service to an app with a receiver defined in the manifest when a sign-in event occurs.
SIGN_OUT - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.actions
Action sent as a broadcast intent by the Workpath service to an app with a receiver defined in the manifest when a sign-out event occurs.

Provides the sets of sign-in actions and failure message to complete authentication process.

Constructor to build sign-in action and failure message(optional).

A collection of sign-in types for completing authentication process.
SignInMethod - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
The SignInMethod class represents a sign-in method used for authentication.

Requests sign out on a device.
SLEEP - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.actions
Action sent as a broadcast intent by the Workpath service to an app with a receiver defined in the manifest when the device enters sleep mode.

Thrown to indicate that a printer doesn't support SDK or a device has incompatible version of SDK.

Submits a copy job asynchronously to the Printer using the provided copy attributes.

Submits a print job asynchronously to the Printer using the provided print attributes.

Submits a print job asynchronously to the Printer using the provided print attributes.
submit(Context, ScanAttributes, ScanletAttributes) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScannerService

SuppliesService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies
SuppliesService provides interfaces to retrieve Supplies from a printer.
Supply - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Provides Supply information
Supply.Capacity - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Retrieves Capacity
Supply.ConsumableStateAction - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"
Supply.Installation - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"

Retrieves PreviousCartridge information

Retrieves PreviousCartridges information

Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"
